llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Manually injected from Table 3, p.56: DiD regression coefficient on resolution_rate for treated agents post-AI
llm_extracted.notes: Manual injection: regression coef 0.013 (SE 0.00882) on resolution_rate from Brynjolfsson Li Raymond 2024 Table 3 Col 3 (p.56). N=12,295 agent-month observations split evenly across arms. Pooled SD computed as Bernoulli sqrt(p(1-p)) at baseline p=0.82. Effect is described in paper as 'economically modest and insignificant'.
source_quotes: Column 3 of Table 3 indicates a small 1.3 percentage point increase in chat resolution rates.

computed.notes: Manual injection from Table 3 regression. Hedges' g treats binary resolution outcome with Bernoulli SD at baseline p=0.82. Sample sizes are agent-month obs split evenly. Effect is small and reported as insignificant in source paper.
